# .NET Version Upgrade Progress

## Overview

Upgrading SimpleWebApp from net8.0 to net9.0 with code modernization. Applying All-at-Once strategy: single project with TFM upgrade, minimal hosting model migration, nullable reference types, and implicit usings.

**Progress**: 2/3 tasks complete <progress value="67" max="100"></progress> 67%

## Tasks

- ✅ 01-prerequisites: Verify SDK and baseline build ([Content](tasks/01-prerequisites/task.md), [Progress](tasks/01-prerequisites/progress-details.md))
- ✅ 02-upgrade-simplewebapp: Upgrade SimpleWebApp to .NET 9 with modernization ([Content](tasks/02-upgrade-simplewebapp/task.md), [Progress](tasks/02-upgrade-simplewebapp/progress-details.md))
- 🔄 03-final-validation: Final validation and commit ([Content](tasks/03-final-validation/task.md))
